channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: shlokkhemani/rabbithole
item.description: An infinite canvas for learning — select text, ask, and answers branch out as documents. MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and any agent. — ⭐206, JavaScript

item.title: bolivestilo/Homekit
item.description: Homekit gives any AI agent direct, physical control over Apple Home. Flip lights. Lock doors. Read sensors. Through a single open interface. — ⭐66, TypeScript

item.title: NLACE-COM/mcp-supermercados-cl
item.description: Servidor MCP para buscar productos, comparar precios y armar la mejor lista de compra en supermercados chilenos (Jumbo, Santa Isabel, Unimarc, Tottus, Lider) desde Claude o ChatGPT. 100% local. — ⭐40, TypeScript

item.title: bepitulaz/obsidian-multivault-mcp
item.description: Multi-vault and multiuser Obsidian MCP — ⭐31, TypeScript

item.title: Chester-2026/Gov-Stat-MCP-Server
item.description: A Centralized MCP Server for Fetching Data from Many Countries' Govs — ⭐21, Python

item.title: animaios/anima-use-google
item.description: MCP server + browser sidecar extension that lets AI agents run Google AI Mode searches using your own logged-in browser session — ⭐20, JavaScript

item.title: mixelpixx/Konnect
item.description: AI-assisted PCB design for KiCAD 10. Native KiCAD plugin — a single Rust binary exposing 171 schematic, layout, routing, design-review, and manufacturing tools to Claude, or the LLM of your choosing — ⭐18, Rust

item.title: MentionNetwork/awesome-agentic-commerce
item.description: A curated list of awesome agentic commerce resources — protocols, MCP servers, tools, apps, APIs and services for AI agents that shop, sell and transact. For store owners, developers, agencies and mar — ⭐11, n/a

item.title: max-ramas/rms-memory-mcp
item.description: Persistent, local, cross-IDE memory for AI agents — markdown source of truth, LanceDB-powered semantic search, zero cloud dependency — ⭐11, Rust

item.title: axisrobo/mneme-open
item.description: Open-source client SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Go), CLI, API docs, and prebuilt binaries for the Mneme agent cognition runtime (memory, context, ontology, knowledge). Apache-2.0. — ⭐9, Python

item.title: sgateway/s-gw
item.description: Local credential control for AI coding agents. — ⭐8, TypeScript

item.title: CyberSealNull/tokenlife-mcp
item.description: 让 AI 玩一遍自己的一生 — TokenLife (tokenlife.me) 的 MCP server — ⭐7, JavaScript

item.title: agentcathq/agentcat-go-sdk
item.description: AgentCat is an analytics platform for MCP server owners 🐱 — ⭐7, Go

item.title: ralfferreira/behringer-wing-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol server for Behringer WING digital mixers over OSC/UDP. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: 100yenadmin/boardstate
item.description: Your dashboard is data. Any AI can build it; any human can edit it. A protocol + runtime for agent-composable dashboards — layout-as-data, one guarded control plane, sandboxed agent-authored widgets, — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: ahadkhan9/workspace-mirror-skill
item.description: — ⭐5, Python

item.title: Gowthaman90/mcp-bastion
item.description: Reliability + security proxy for the Model Context Protocol (MCP): self-healing connections, runtime tool-security (rug-pull/poisoning detection), and a compliance-mapped audit trail. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: wassermanproductions/blockout-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Blockout — drive the open-source previs app from any MCP agent (Hermes, Claude, Codex). Zero dependencies. — ⭐5, JavaScript

item.title: wassermanproductions/motion-previs-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Motion Previs Studio — extract camera + performance motion from reference footage via any MCP agent (Hermes, Claude, Codex). Zero dependencies. — ⭐5, JavaScript

item.title: daviddme/capitol-alpha-terminal
item.description: Bloomberg-style terminal for public U.S. politician stock disclosures (STOCK Act): backtests on their real exits, copyability leaderboards, AI screening, Alpaca copy-trading automation, and an MCP ser — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: Lulu-The-Narwhal/dali-mcp
item.description: Creative intelligence MCP — score your prompt before you spend the credit — ⭐5, Python

item.title: truman-t3/keyshot-mcp
item.description: MCP server for controlling KeyShot Studio through headless scripting. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: KernelLord/pickysteve
item.description: Skill router and context picker for Claude Code, Cursor, and Aider. Auto-picks the right skill for every prompt, with prompt-injection filtering for MCP. — ⭐5, Python

item.title: Naveen-chava/metabase-mcp
item.description: Metabase MCP server for AI Agents. Authenticate with a browser session cookie, no API key required. — ⭐5, Go

item.title: tough-tongue/toughtongue-skills
item.description: Agent skills and MCP server for Tough Tongue AI. Create voice-agent scenarios, refine them from real transcripts, and analyze session performance from Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor. — ⭐5, n/a

item.title: igun997/motion-diagram
item.description: Agent-driven animated API/flow diagram renderer (MP4 + carousel) with an MCP server — ⭐4, JavaScript

item.title: Dometrain/mcp
item.description: Official Dometrain MCP server plugin — ground your coding agent in Dometrain courses — ⭐4, n/a

item.title: seanpdwyer7/franchise-mcp-server
item.description: MCP server for editing EA College Football 27 dynasty and Madden NFL franchise save files - LLM tooling built on bep713/madden-franchise — ⭐4, JavaScript

item.title: sorcerai/skill-router
item.description: Lazy-loader MCP server for Claude Code skills: search/load on demand instead of preloading the whole library — ⭐4, JavaScript

item.title: markandeyay/spotify-mcp
item.description: Remote MCP server linking Claude to Spotify, with smart playlist, listening-trend, and library analysis. — ⭐4, TypeScript
